PowerShell($buildDir = "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build"; if \(Test-Path $buildDir\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $buildDir -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "build dir size: $\([math]::Round\($size,1\)\) MB" } else { "no build dir" })

PowerShell($pw = "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\pw-browsers"; $size = \(Get-ChildItem $pw -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "pw-browsers size: $\([math]::Round\($size,1\)\) MB"; Get-ChildItem $pw -Name)

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\pw-browsers\\chromium_headless_shell-1187" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist\\ZiraQARunner.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist\\ZiraQARunner.exe" | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist\\ZiraQARunner.exe"; Start-Sleep 15; $procs = Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { "STATUS: running, $\($procs.Count\) process\(es\), top wset: $\([math]::Round\($procs[0].WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)\) MB" } else { "STATUS: process not running" }; "---DEBUG LOG---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log"\) { Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" } else { "\(no debug log written\)" })
Bash(until [ -s "/c/Users/Admin/AppData/Roaming/ZiraQA/launcher_debug.log" ]; do sleep 2; done; echo "=== debug log appeared ==="; cat "/c/Users/Admin/AppData/Roaming/ZiraQA/launcher_debug.log")

PowerShell("---DIST FOLDER---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "---DEFENDER THREATS \(last 24h\)---"; try { Get-MpThreatDetection -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.InitialDetectionTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-24\) } | Select-Object ThreatID, InitialDetectionTime, @{N='File';E={$_.Resources -join '; '}} } catch { "\(Get-MpThreatDetection not available: $\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" }; "---DEFENDER QUARANTINE LISTING---"; if \(Test-Path "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Quarantine"\) { Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Quarantine" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime -First 10 } else { "\(quarantine folder not accessible\)" })

PowerShell("=== Top-level C:\\ folders \(this can take a minute\) ==="; Get-ChildItem C:\\ -Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $size = 0; try { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Sum } catch {}; [PSCustomObject]@{ Folder = $_.Name; SizeGB = [math]::Round\(\($size / 1GB\), 2\) } } | Sort-Object SizeGB -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("---disk now---"; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1MB,0\)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}}; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist\\ZiraQARunner.exe"; "launched")

PowerShell("---PROCESSES---"; Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N='WSMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}}, MainWindowTitle, MainWindowHandle; "---DEBUG LOG \(recent\)---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log"\) { Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" | Select-Object -Last 12 } else { "\(no log\)" })

PowerShell(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Count; "Remaining: $\(\(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count\)")

PowerShell("---disk---"; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1MB,0\)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}}; "---build/dist/pw-browsers sizes---"; foreach \($p in @\("c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build", "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist", "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\pw-browsers"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "{0,8} MB   {1}" -f [math]::Round\($s,0\), $p } else { "         missing    $p" } }; "---running launcher procs---"; Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N='WSMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\pw-browsers" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "{0,8} MB   {1}" -f [math]::Round\($s,0\), $_.Name })

PowerShell(Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Process "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist\\ZiraQARunner.exe"; "launched")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowHandle -ne 0 } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle, @{N='\\''WSMB'\\'';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; if \(-not \(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowHandle -ne 0 }\)\) { '\\''NO VISIBLE WINDOW'\\'' }')

PowerShell(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\config.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\launcher_debug.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main"; & "$pwd\\build_exe.bat" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8 | Out-String)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowHandle -ne 0 } | Select-Object Id, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize')

PowerShell($c = Get-Content -Raw "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build_exe.bat"; $c = $c -replace "`r?`n", "`r`n"; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build_exe.bat", $c\); "Re-normalized CRLF"; "---disk---"; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main"; & "$pwd\\build_exe.bat" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10 | Out-String)

PowerShell("---config---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\config.json"\) { Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\ZiraQA\\config.json" } else { "\(no saved config - wizard will run again\)" }; "---disk free---"; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName "Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational" -MaxEvents 200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 1124 -or $_.Id -eq 1123 } | Sort-Object TimeCreated -Descending | Select-Object -First 5 TimeCreated, Id, @{N='Msg';E={$_.Message}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-Process ZiraQARunner -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main"; & "$pwd\\build_exe.bat" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6 | Out-String)

PowerShell("---disk---"; Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='FreeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1MB,0\)}}; "---project dirs---"; foreach \($p in @\("c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\build", "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\dist", "c:\\Users\\Admin\\Automation\\Automation-main\\pw-browsers"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "{0,8} MB   {1}" -f [math]::Round\($s,0\), $p } else { "         missing    $p" } }; "---temp---"; $s = \(Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; "{0,8} MB   {1}" -f [math]::Round\($s,0\), $env:TEMP)

PowerShell("Top 10 biggest items in TEMP:"; Get-ChildItem $env:TEMP -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $size = 0; if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { try { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum } catch {} } else { $size = $_.Length }; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$_.Name; MB=[math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\); IsDir=$_.PSIsContainer } } | Sort-Object MB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
